title: TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES - 211info
text: FLORENCE OUTREACH OFFICE TRIBAL MEMBER SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF General office for intake and information for services and programs. 3757 Highway 101 Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Federally recognized tribal members or children of tribal members Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (541) 997-6685 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 997-6685 Toll-free (866) 313-9913 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, Douglas, Lane, and Lincoln Counties Services: Native American General Assistance Specialized Information and Referral * Native American Community Tribal Council Offices If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FLORENCE OUTREACH OFFICE
